'''''Star Wars Annual'' 1981''' was a hardcover comic book released in the United Kingdom that reprinted the stories from [[Star Wars (1977) 48|''Star Wars'' (1977) 48]], [[Star Wars (1977) 45|''Star Wars'' (1977) 45]] and [[Star Wars (1977) 47|''Star Wars'' (1977) 47]].

The stories were first printed in the UK in [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 136|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 136]]-[[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 139|''139'']], [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 140|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 140]] and [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 142|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 142]].

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 45|''Star Wars'' (1977) 45]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 47|''Star Wars'' (1977) 47]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 48|''Star Wars'' (1977) 48]]
